results.taskDescription: Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

The top stories on Hacker News today highlighted a fascinating blend of rapid technological advancement, deep theoretical computer science, and practical hardware concerns. The discussion was particularly engaged with the accelerating role of AI in problem-solving, alongside critical discussions
